title: JV‘s Pillage
description: Added more, the raiders originally belonged to Jerotes village
body:
This mod is a further stripped‑down version of [Jerotes Village‘s Pillage](https://modrinth.com/mod/jerotes-villages-pillage), with the Villager Metal items and three related entities removed, and the registry names changed.
This allows players—such as those who enjoy “bug‑fighting” gameplay—to use this mod alongside the original Jerotes Village mod.

If you need a version that retains the Villager Metal content, you can try the original Jerotes Village or [Jerotes Village‘s Pillage](https://modrinth.com/mod/jerotes-villages-pillage).

![Raiders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7171c5a8025f9d620150767ddd9cc77ac13be11c.png)﻿

![Ominous Banner Raid Force](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73f3f2e6dd105a884e2b37f57ac96d389f002b17.png)

![Grandmother and Her Pursuivant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67664f0573d6c30ec0801427c8b961521f8c7b83.png)
